structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-27 Home in 5 Platinum Waitlist for Non-Targeted Areas
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-27 13:34:20-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Limited funds for non-target area loans are now only available through a $500,000 waitlist, which we anticipate will be fully reserved within minutes. Loans placed on the waitlist cannot be certified or closed until notified that funds have been released. As loans fall out, funds are replenished and waitlisted loans are moved into the program once confirmed active and closing on time.

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	eHousing Email Announcement

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
